ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the technologies table */,
  "installation_year" INTEGER /* Year the asset was installed */,
  "installed_capacity" REAL /* Installed capacity of the asset in MW */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., operational, decommissioned) */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installing the asset */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost of the asset */,
  "expected_lifetime" INTEGER /* Expected lifetime of the asset in years */,
  "decommissioned_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was decommissioned */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the asset (JSON format) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_data" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy_assets table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the capacity data is recorded for */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the asset in MW for the given year */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy_assets table */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (JSON format) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy_assets table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance data is recorded for */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the asset (JSON format) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
